nasb.text: But everyone will die for his own iniquity; each man who eats the sour grapes, his teeth will be set on edge.

esv.text: But everyone shall die for his own iniquity. Each man who eats sour grapes, his teeth shall be set on edge.

cnv.text: 因為各人必因自己的罪孽死亡；吃酸葡萄的，那人的牙齒必酸倒。

ccb.text: 因为各人都要承担自己的罪，谁吃酸葡萄，谁的牙酸倒。”
